title: Purge virus
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Purge virus''' was a computer virus.

It was used by [[Alien/Legends|alien]] cultures who did not like the idea of other races 'stealing' or using their technology, downloading into the interfacing [[Computer/Legends|computer]]. There, it slowly worked its way to destroy the computer core, at which point the person suffering from the computer virus had the option of visiting the creator of the virus and paying a "fee" to give the translation code needed to restore the computer database.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-XX -->''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]''
